productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Black Shoes
description: Crafted from a combination of leathers, this casual shoe from red tape makes for a perfect buy this party season. Upper Full grain leather, suede and patent leather combination upper Velcro closure straps on the midfoot for a snug Fit Mildly padded tongue and collar for comfort Leather inner lining with a leather-lined footbed for sweat-free comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with lugs on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth and suede brush to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
